title: LuhTech Equity Instrument
description: Governs equity allocation from SME or CoE founder contribution to a venture. The instrument is triggered when a venture-edge record has equityImplication=true. Contribution value is computed from the USF-weighted ledger of draw records. Vesting schedule converts accrued value into actual cap table entries. This is the mechanism by which domain experts become founders — not employees — in the ventures they build.

instrumentId.description: Canonical URN. Unique per SME-venture pair. Format: urn:luhtech:equity:<venture>-<person-slug>. Example: urn:luhtech:equity:ectropy-jane-smith

sme.description: The SME or CoE founder receiving equity. Domain experts are recruited by the accelerator to lead ventures — this instrument is the bridge from contribution to ownership.

smeId.description: URN for this person across the portfolio. Stable — does not change if they contribute to multiple ventures.

coeDomain.description: The domain expertise this SME brings. Determines service category assignment. Examples: 'construction-technology', 'bioinformatics', 'regenerative-agriculture', 'fabrication-engineering', 'adu-architecture'.

role.description: Intended or actual role in the venture. Examples: 'Co-Founder & CTO', 'Domain Lead', 'Advisory'.

serviceNodeRef.description: URN of the coe-time service node that represents this person's time allocation in the service graph.

contributionType.description: Primary contribution category. domain-expertise = industry knowledge, customer relationships, regulatory navigation. technical = engineering, architecture, code. advisory = strategic guidance, network, mentorship. operational = execution, process, team management.

ventureId.description: The venture this instrument is issued against. Equity is venture-specific — an SME contributing to two ventures gets two instruments.

edgeRefs.description: One or more venture-edge URNs representing this SME's contribution draws to this venture. These are the receipts. The USF-weighted ledger totals across all referenced edges are the basis for valuation. Multiple edges allowed if SME contributes via multiple service nodes to the same venture.

valuation.description: Equity valuation block. Derived from ledger totals on referenced edges, weighted by USF scores at time of draw. Stored as ComputedValue fields so formula and provenance are auditable.

contributionValue.description: Total dollar-equivalent value of contribution. Formula: sum(edge.ledger[*].allocatedValue) across all edgeRefs. This is the USF-weighted economic measure of what the SME has contributed.

equityPercentage.description: Percentage of venture equity granted. Derived from contributionValue relative to total venture valuation at grant date. Negotiated at instrument creation — not auto-computed.

ventureValuationAtGrant.description: Agreed venture valuation (USD) at time of instrument creation. Used as the denominator for equityPercentage calculation.

grantDate.description: Date equity grant was agreed and instrument activated.

instrumentType.description: Legal form of the equity. equity-grant = direct equity. safe-equivalent = modeled as SAFE economics for pre-formation ventures. option-pool = options with strike price. advisory-grant = smaller advisory equity tranche.

vesting.description: Vesting schedule governing when accrued equity becomes owned equity. Milestone-based acceleration available for construction/pilot events.

cliffMonths.description: Months before any equity vests. 0 = immediate vesting begins. 12 = standard 1-year cliff.

durationMonths.description: Total vesting period in months from grant date. 48 = standard 4-year. Remaining equity vests monthly after cliff.

vestingType.description: time-based = monthly vesting on schedule. milestone-based = vests on defined project milestones. hybrid = time-based with acceleration triggers.

monthlyVestPercent.description: Percentage of total grant that vests each month after cliff. Derived: (1 - cliff_tranche) / (durationMonths - cliffMonths). Populated by transform.

accelerationTriggers.description: Events that accelerate vesting. Critical for construction pilot ventures — hitting a production milestone should vest the SME who made it possible.

triggerId.description: Unique identifier for this trigger. Example: canadian-pilot-go-live.

description.description: Human-readable trigger event. Example: 'Canadian pilot live at Maple Ridge Industrial Facility'.

accelerationPercent.description: Additional percentage of total grant that vests immediately on this trigger.

milestoneRef.description: Optional reference to a roadmap milestone URN that triggers this event when it moves to complete status.

vestedToDate.description: Percentage of total grant vested as of lastComputed date. Computed by transform from grant date, cliff, duration, and any fired triggers. Do not edit manually.

doubleTriggerProtection.description: If true, full acceleration requires both: (1) change of control at holding company level AND (2) SME role termination without cause. Protects SME founders from acquisition without benefit.

capTable.description: Cap table entry for this instrument. Populated once equity grant is formally executed. Pre-execution, this block reflects projected values.

shareClass.description: Class of shares or instrument. CoE founders typically receive common shares in parity with the founding team.

sharesGranted.description: Number of shares granted. Absolute number.

sharesVested.description: Number of shares currently vested. Computed from vestedToDate × sharesGranted.

ownershipPercent.description: Percentage of venture equity on a fully-diluted basis.

antiDilutionProtection.description: Whether this instrument carries anti-dilution protection for future funding rounds.

lastUpdated.description: Date cap table entry was last updated.

status.description: Lifecycle status. proposed = being structured. negotiating = terms under discussion. active = signed and vesting. vested = fully vested. lapsed = SME departed before full vest. cancelled = instrument voided.

legalDocRef.description: Reference to executed legal agreement once instrument is active. Could be a DocuSeal document ID.

x-luhtech.sensitivity: T2 — equity terms are private, treated as business-confidential
x-luhtech.legalNote: Schema defines structure only. Instrument terms require legal review before execution. LuhTech does not provide legal advice.
